---
title:  
    "Titration of EXPIII"
date: 
    "June 10th, 2024"
author:  
    "Ali Movasati"  
output:  
    html_document:
        #css: style.css
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 2
        toc_float: true
        number_sections: true
        theme: lumen
        highlight: zenburn
        code_folding: hide
        code_download: true # to make the Rmd source code available
---




```{r loading libraries, echo=FALSE}


# load libraries
library(readxl)
library(stringr)
library(magrittr)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)



# define functions

`%notin%` <- Negate(`%in%`)

```

```{r read-in qpcr data}


# determine the server path

if (file.exists("/home/amovas/")){
  print("Remote HPC Connection!")
  wd <- "/home/amovas/data/genome-evo-proj/"
} else {
  print("Local PC Connection!")
  wd <- "/Users/alimos313/Documents/studies/phd/hpc-research/genome-evo-proj/"
}



line_col_palette <- c("#ff00ff", "#ff2400", "#6600cc", "#0000ff")
line_labels <- c("MT-2_1", "MT-2_2", "MT-4_1", "MT-4_2")


data <- read_excel(paste0(wd, "data/titration/SummaryMasterfile_qPCR_Titers.xlsx"), sheet = 1, skip = 1)

# determine what data to be included
end_psg <- 500

data %<>% 
        filter(exp_line %in% 13:16,
        passage <= end_psg) 

# correct for the switched experimental lines
data$exp_line[data$exp_line == 15 & data$passage > 360] <- "A"
data$exp_line[data$exp_line == 16 & data$passage > 360] <- "B"

data$exp_line[data$exp_line == "A"] <- "16"
data$exp_line[data$exp_line == "B"] <- "15"

table(data$exp_line, useNA = "always")


# remove duplicates
data <- data[!(data$exp_line == 16 & data$passage == 340 & data$cDNA_Date == "1) 09.06.2021"),]
data <- data[!(data$exp_line == 16 & data$passage == 360 & data$cDNA_Date == "3) 09.06.2021"),]

data <- data[!(data$exp_line == 15 & data$passage == 370 & data$cDNA_Date == "4) 09.06.2021"),]
data <- data[!(data$exp_line == 15 & data$passage == 380 & data$cDNA_Date == "5) 09.06.2021"),]
data <- data[!(data$exp_line == 15 & data$passage == 390 & data$cDNA_Date == "6) 09.06.2021"),]



data %<>% mutate(exp_line = case_when(exp_line==13 ~ "MT-2_1", exp_line==14 ~ "MT-2_2", exp_line==15 ~ "MT-4_1", exp_line==16 ~ "MT-4_2")) # update exp line labels


# needs repeat?
# data$transferred_quantity_EXP_III[data$exp_line == "MT-2_2" & data$passage == 430]



```


```{r dilution factor calculation}


# exceptional case where 17 microliter of water added
data[data$`ul-H2O-added-to-reach-17ul` == "17",]
data$`ul-H2O-added-to-reach-17ul`[data$`ul-H2O-added-to-reach-17ul` == "17"] <- "7"

# modify data to calculate dilution factor of later measurements 
data$`ul-H2O-added-to-reach-17ul`[data$`ul-H2O-added-to-reach-17ul` == "1:10 Dilution!"] <- "15.3"

# get the dilution factor
dilution_factor <- (17 - as.numeric(data$`ul-H2O-added-to-reach-17ul`))/17


# get the copy number per ml based on average quantity
data$mean_quantity_per_ml_cell_culture_supernatant <- data$mean_quantity*70*dilution_factor^(-1)



```


```{r plot qpcr result}



data$passage <- as.numeric(data$passage)
data$exp_line <- factor(data$exp_line, levels = line_labels)


# fit linear models for each group and extract p-values
model_A <- lm(mean_quantity_per_ml_cell_culture_supernatant ~ passage, data = data[data$exp_line == line_labels[1], ])
model_B <- lm(mean_quantity_per_ml_cell_culture_supernatant ~ passage, data = data[data$exp_line == line_labels[2], ])
model_C <- lm(mean_quantity_per_ml_cell_culture_supernatant ~ passage, data = data[data$exp_line == line_labels[3], ])
model_D <- lm(mean_quantity_per_ml_cell_culture_supernatant ~ passage, data = data[data$exp_line == line_labels[4], ])


# extract the p-values
p_value_A <- summary(model_A)$coefficients[2, 4]  
p_value_B <- summary(model_B)$coefficients[2, 4]
p_value_C <- summary(model_C)$coefficients[2, 4]  
p_value_D <- summary(model_D)$coefficients[2, 4]

# create a data.frame for annotation
p_value_df <- data.frame(exp_line = line_labels, p_val = c(p_value_A, p_value_B, p_value_C, p_value_D))


# make the ggplot object



titration_fig <- data %>% ggplot(aes(x = passage, y = log10(mean_quantity_per_ml_cell_culture_supernatant), color = exp_line)) +
                facet_wrap(~exp_line) +
                geom_line() +
                geom_point() +
                geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
                geom_text(data = p_value_df, aes(x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste0("P.value = ", round(p_val, 3))),
                hjust = 1.1, vjust = 2, size = 8, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
                labs(title = "qPCR Result \n", x = "\n Transfer", y = "Log10(RNA Copy/ml)\n", color = "Virus Line") +
                #ylim(c(1000000,40000000)) +
                scale_color_manual(values = line_col_palette) +
                theme_bw() +
                theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 30, hjust = 0.5),
                    axis.title = element_text(size = 25),
                    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 20, angle = 90),
                    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 20),
                    legend.title = element_text(size=20),
                    legend.text = element_text(size = 15),
                    strip.text = element_text(size = 25))

# save figure
date <- str_split(Sys.time(), pattern = " ")[[1]][1]
fig_dir <- paste0(wd, "results/figs/publication/expiii/provisional/", date, "/")
ifelse(!dir.exists(file.path(fig_dir)), dir.create(file.path(fig_dir)), FALSE)
pdf(file = paste0(fig_dir, "titration_qpcr_expiii.pdf"), height = 14, width = 14)
titration_fig
dev.off()




```

```{r qPCR average estimates}

library(boot)

log10(mean(data$mean_quantity_per_ml_cell_culture_supernatant))
# Define a function to calculate the statistic of interest (e.g., mean)
mean_stat <- function(data, indices) {
  return(mean(data[indices]))
}

boot_results <- boot(data$mean_quantity_per_ml_cell_culture_supernatant, statistic = mean_stat, R = 1000)

ci <- boot.ci(boot_results, type = "perc")

log10(ci$percent[4:5])




```

```{r}


# The qPCR levels for none of the cell lines is statistically difference from one another

pairwise.t.test(data$mean_quantity_per_ml_cell_culture_supernatant, data$exp_line, p.adjust.method = "none")



```




```{r}

# tcid data to plot MOIs


data <- as.data.frame(read_excel(paste0(wd, "data/titration/tcid50.xlsx")))
head(data)


data$passage <- sapply(strsplit(data$Sample_ID, "p"), "[", 2)
data$passage[is.na(data$passage)] <- 0
data$lines <- substring(data$Sample_ID, 8,9)
data$lines[data$lines == ""] <- "ancestral"

# correct for the switched experimental lines
data$lines[data$lines == 15 & data$passage > 360] <- "A"
data$lines[data$lines == 16 & data$passage > 360] <- "B"

data$lines[data$lines == "A"] <- "16"
data$lines[data$lines == "B"] <- "15"


data %<>% mutate(exp_line = case_when(lines==13 ~ "MT-2_1", lines==14 ~ "MT-2_2", lines==15 ~ "MT-4_1", lines==16 ~ "MT-4_2")) # update exp line labels



data_sub <- data[data$Source_abv %in% c("2022_rfc_i","2022_rfc_ii", "2018_christine","2024_christine"),]
data_sub <- data_sub[data_sub$passage != "NL4_3",]

data_sub$passage <- as.numeric(data_sub$passage)
data_sub$lines <- factor(data_sub$exp_line, levels = line_labels)
data_sub$Source_abv <- factor(data_sub$Source_abv, levels = c("2024_christine","2018_christine","2022_rfc_i","2022_rfc_ii"))

data_sub %<>% filter(Sample_ID != "NL4_3")


result <- data_sub %>%
  group_by(exp_line, passage) %>%
  summarise(value = ifelse(n() > 1, mean(MOI), unique(MOI)), .groups = 'drop')




moi__fig <- data_sub %>% ggplot(aes(x = passage, y = log10(MOI), color = exp_line)) +
                facet_wrap(~ exp_line) +
                geom_line(aes(linetype=Source_abv)) +
                geom_point() +
                #ylim(c(1000000,40000000)) +
                labs(title = "moi") +
                scale_color_manual(values = line_col_palette) +
                theme_bw() +
                theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
                axis.title.x = element_text(size = 25),
                axis.title.y = element_text(size = 25),
                axis.text = element_text(size = 15))


# save figure
date <- str_split(Sys.time(), pattern = " ")[[1]][1]
fig_dir <- paste0(wd, "results/figs/publication/expiii/provisional/", date, "/")
ifelse(!dir.exists(file.path(fig_dir)), dir.create(file.path(fig_dir)), FALSE)
pdf(file = paste0(fig_dir, "moi.pdf"), height = 14, width = 14)
moi__fig
dev.off()

```



```{r }

# produce the MOI figure by taking the average of values for dates where there are more than one data point available.


logarithmic_mean <- function(values) {
  # Check if there are at least two values
  if (length(values) == 1) {
    return(values)
  }
  
  # Check if all values are positive
  if (any((as.numeric(table(values)) >= 2))) {
    return(values[1])
  }
  
  # Calculate the logarithmic mean
  n <- length(values)
  log_mean <- mean(sapply(1:(n-1), function(i) {
    a <- values[i]
    b <- values[i+1]
    (b - a) / (log(b) - log(a))
  }))
  
  return(log_mean)
}


result <- data_sub %>%
    group_by(exp_line, passage) %>%
    summarise(MOI = ifelse(n() > 1, logarithmic_mean(MOI), unique(MOI)), .groups = 'drop') %>%
    filter(passage %notin% c(10,30,50,70, 90))



# fit linear models for each group and extract p-values
model_A <- lm(MOI ~ passage, data = result[result$exp_line == line_labels[1], ])
model_B <- lm(MOI ~ passage, data = result[result$exp_line == line_labels[2], ])
model_C <- lm(MOI ~ passage, data = result[result$exp_line == line_labels[3], ])
model_D <- lm(MOI ~ passage, data = result[result$exp_line == line_labels[4], ])


# extract the p-values
p_value_A <- summary(model_A)$coefficients[2, 4]  
p_value_B <- summary(model_B)$coefficients[2, 4]
p_value_C <- summary(model_C)$coefficients[2, 4]  
p_value_D <- summary(model_D)$coefficients[2, 4]

# create a data.frame for annotation
p_value_df <- data.frame(exp_line = line_labels, p_val = c(p_value_A, p_value_B, p_value_C, p_value_D))




moi__fig <- result %>% ggplot(aes(x = passage, y = log10(MOI), color = exp_line)) +
                facet_wrap(~ exp_line) +
                geom_line() +
                geom_point() +
                geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
                geom_text(data = p_value_df, aes(x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste0("P.value = ", round(p_val, 3))),
                hjust = 2.1, vjust = 2, size = 5, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
                #ylim(c(1000000,40000000)) +
                labs(title = "moi") +
                scale_color_manual(values = line_col_palette) +
                theme_bw() +
                theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
                axis.title.x = element_text(size = 25),
                axis.title.y = element_text(size = 25),
                axis.text = element_text(size = 15))


# save figure
date <- str_split(Sys.time(), pattern = " ")[[1]][1]
fig_dir <- paste0(wd, "results/figs/publication/expiii/provisional/", date, "/")
ifelse(!dir.exists(file.path(fig_dir)), dir.create(file.path(fig_dir)), FALSE)
pdf(file = paste0(fig_dir, "moi_cleaned.pdf"), height = 14, width = 14)
moi__fig
dev.off()

```

```{r in text measures}

# The MOI levels for none of the cell lines is statistically difference from one another

pairwise.t.test(data$MOI, data$exp_line, p.adjust.method = "none")



# define a function to calculate the CI
confidence_interval <- function(data, conf.level = 0.95) {
    n <- length(data)
    mean_value <- mean(data)
    sd_value <- sd(data)
    
    # Calculate standard error
    se <- sd_value / sqrt(n)
    
    # Calculate margin of error
    error_margin <- qt(1 - (1 - conf.level) / 2, df = n - 1) * se
    
    # Calculate confidence interval
    ci_lower <- mean_value - error_margin
    ci_upper <- mean_value + error_margin
    
    return(c(lower = ci_lower, upper = ci_upper))
}

mean(result$MOI)
confidence_interval(result$MOI)

median(result$MOI)
quantile(result$MOI, probs = c(0.25,0.5,0.75))
IQR(result$MOI)


```


```{r }

# produce the MOI figure by not considering the 2024 results

result <- data_sub %>%
    filter(Source_abv != "2024_christine") %>%
    # filter(passage %notin% c(10)) %>%
    group_by(exp_line, passage) %>%
    summarise(MOI = ifelse(n() > 1, logarithmic_mean(MOI), unique(MOI)), .groups = 'drop')



# fit linear models for each group and extract p-values
model_A <- lm(MOI ~ passage, data = result[result$exp_line == line_labels[1], ])
model_B <- lm(MOI ~ passage, data = result[result$exp_line == line_labels[2], ])
model_C <- lm(MOI ~ passage, data = result[result$exp_line == line_labels[3], ])
model_D <- lm(MOI ~ passage, data = result[result$exp_line == line_labels[4], ])


# extract the p-values
p_value_A <- summary(model_A)$coefficients[2, 4]  
p_value_B <- summary(model_B)$coefficients[2, 4]
p_value_C <- summary(model_C)$coefficients[2, 4]  
p_value_D <- summary(model_D)$coefficients[2, 4]

# create a data.frame for annotation
p_value_df <- data.frame(exp_line = line_labels, p_val = c(p_value_A, p_value_B, p_value_C, p_value_D))



moi__fig <- result %>% ggplot(aes(x = passage, y = log10(MOI), color = exp_line)) +
                facet_wrap(~ exp_line) +
                geom_line() +
                geom_point() +
                geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE) +
                #geom_text(data = p_value_df, aes(x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste0("P.value = ", round(p_val, 3))),
                #hjust = 2.1, vjust = 2, size = 5, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
                #ylim(c(1000000,40000000)) +
                labs(title = "MOI\n", x = "\nTransfer", y = "Log10(MOI)\n", color = "Virus Line") +
                scale_color_manual(values = line_col_palette) +
                theme_bw() +
                theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 30, hjust = 0.5),
                    axis.title = element_text(size = 25),
                    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 20, angle = 90),
                    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 20),
                    legend.title = element_text(size=20),
                    legend.text = element_text(size = 15),
                    strip.text = element_text(size = 25))


# save figure
date <- str_split(Sys.time(), pattern = " ")[[1]][1]
fig_dir <- paste0(wd, "results/figs/publication/expiii/provisional/", date, "/")
ifelse(!dir.exists(file.path(fig_dir)), dir.create(file.path(fig_dir)), FALSE)
pdf(file = paste0(fig_dir, "moi_cleaned.pdf"), height = 14, width = 14)
moi__fig
dev.off()


```



```{r in text measures}

# The MOI levels for none of the cell lines is statistically difference from one another

pairwise.t.test(result$MOI, result$exp_line, p.adjust.method = "none", paired = T)
pairwise.wilcox.test(result$MOI[result$passage >= 200], result$exp_line[result$passage >= 200], p.adjust.method = "BH")

wilcox.test(400000*result$MOI[result$passage >= 300 & result$exp_line == "MT-2_2"], 400000*result$MOI[result$passage >= 300 & result$exp_line == "MT-4_1"])



mean(result$MOI[result$passage >= 200 & result$exp_line == "MT-4_2"])
head(data_sub)
a <- data_sub %>% 
    filter(passage >= 300 & exp_line %in% c("MT-2_1", "MT-2_2")) %>%
    select(MOI)

median(a$MOI)*400000
quantile(a$MOI, probs = c(0.25,0.5,0.75))*400000

b <- data_sub %>% 
    filter(passage >= 300 & exp_line == "MT-4_1") %>%
    select(MOI)

median(b$MOI)*400000
quantile(b$MOI, probs = c(0.25,0.5,0.75))*400000

3465/716
wilcox.test(a$MOI,b$MOI)

result %>%
    filter(passage >= 200) %>%
    group_by(exp_line) %>%
    summarise(val = mean(MOI))

head(result)

median(result$MOI)

quantile(result$MOI, probs = c(0.25,0.5,0.75))
IQR(result$MOI)



harmonic_mean <- function(x) {
  return(length(x) / sum(1 / x))
}

vec <- c(716.8*12, 716.8*12^2, 716.8*12^3)
vec2 <- c(3465*12, 3465*12^2, 3465*12^3)
mean(vec)
log10(harmonic_mean(vec))
log10(harmonic_mean(vec2))
harmonic_mean(vec2)/harmonic_mean(vec)



vec <- c(716.8*44, 716.8*44^2)
vec2 <- c(3465*44, 3465*44^2)
mean(vec)
log10(harmonic_mean(vec))
log10(harmonic_mean(vec2))
harmonic_mean(vec2)/harmonic_mean(vec)


```





```{r}


# are tcid50 values different on the other line?

result <- data_sub %>%
    filter(Source_abv != "2018_christine") %>%
    mutate(moi_on_mt2 = `TCID50/ml_MT2`*0.7*2/(1000*400000), moi_on_mt4 = `TCID50/ml_MT4`*0.7*2/(1000*400000)) %>%
    select(Source_abv,passage,exp_line,moi_on_mt2,moi_on_mt4) %>%
    pivot_longer(
        cols = starts_with("moi_on"),   # Specify columns to pivot
        names_to = "host",            # Name of the new column that will contain the old column names
        values_to = "moi"                  # Name of the new column that will contain the values
    ) %>%
    group_by(exp_line, passage, host) %>%
    summarise(value = ifelse(n() > 1, mean(moi), unique(moi)), .groups = 'drop')

# fit linear models for each group and extract p-values
test_A <- t.test(result$value[result$host == "moi_on_mt2" & result$exp_line == line_labels[1]],result$value[result$host == "moi_on_mt4" & result$exp_line == line_labels[1]], paired = TRUE)
test_B <- t.test(result$value[result$host == "moi_on_mt2" & result$exp_line == line_labels[2]],result$value[result$host == "moi_on_mt4" & result$exp_line == line_labels[2]], paired = TRUE)
test_C <- t.test(result$value[result$host == "moi_on_mt2" & result$exp_line == line_labels[3]],result$value[result$host == "moi_on_mt4" & result$exp_line == line_labels[3]], paired = TRUE)
test_D <- t.test(result$value[result$host == "moi_on_mt2" & result$exp_line == line_labels[4]],result$value[result$host == "moi_on_mt4" & result$exp_line == line_labels[4]], paired = TRUE)


# extract the p-values
p_value_A <- test_A$p.value
p_value_B <- test_B$p.value
p_value_C <- test_C$p.value
p_value_D <- test_D$p.value

# create a data.frame for annotation
p_value_df <- data.frame(exp_line = line_labels, p_val = c(p_value_A, p_value_B, p_value_C, p_value_D))




moi__fig <- result %>% ggplot(aes(x = passage, y = log10(value), color = exp_line)) +
                facet_wrap(~ exp_line) +
                geom_line(aes(linetype=host)) +
                geom_point() +
                #ylim(c(1000000,40000000)) +
                labs(title = "moi on different lines") +
                geom_text(data = p_value_df, aes(x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste0("P.value = ", round(p_val, 3))),
                hjust = 2.1, vjust = 2, size = 5, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
                scale_color_manual(values = line_col_palette) +
                theme_bw() +
                theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
                axis.title.x = element_text(size = 25),
                axis.title.y = element_text(size = 25),
                axis.text = element_text(size = 15))


# save figure
date <- str_split(Sys.time(), pattern = " ")[[1]][1]
fig_dir <- paste0(wd, "results/figs/publication/expiii/provisional/", date, "/")
ifelse(!dir.exists(file.path(fig_dir)), dir.create(file.path(fig_dir)), FALSE)
pdf(file = paste0(fig_dir, "moi_cleaned_on_respective_hosts.pdf"), height = 14, width = 14)
moi__fig
dev.off()





```
